import unittest

from wordscore.core import score_phrase


class TestScorePhrase(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_counts_repeated_words(self):
        self.assertEqual(score_phrase('red blue red'), {'red': 2, 'blue': 1})

    def test_lowercases_words(self):
        self.assertEqual(score_phrase('RED blue'), {'red': 1, 'blue': 1})


if __name__ == '__main__':
    unittest.main()
